description: Validate a .docx (or an unpacked dir) against OOXML XSD schemas plus tracked-changes (redlining) rules, with auto-repair of hex IDs and whitespace preservation.
rules: read-only re: the user's documents; --auto-repair acts only on a temp/unpacked copy
checks XML well-formedness, namespaces, unique IDs, references, content-types, XSD, redlining
with ORIGINAL_DOCX set, reports only NEW errors vs the original
usage: Set DOCX_PATH (a .docx file or unpacked dir). Optional ORIGINAL_DOCX for new-error-only diffing. Output: validate.txt.
limitation: The vendored validators import defusedxml; if absent the porter records the import error and exits 0 with an empty report (degraded). With defusedxml + lxml present it runs the full validation suite.
